This biographical article related to a Ukrainian association football midfielder born in the 1970s is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Serhiy_Kovalyov&action=edit).

([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Сергій Миколайович Ковальов; 21 November 1971 in [Donetsk Oblast](/wiki/Donetsk_Oblast "Donetsk Oblast"), [Ukrainian SSR](/wiki/Ukrainian_SSR "Ukrainian SSR")) was a [Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine") professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") and currently is football manager.
["Serhiy Kovalyov - International Appearances"](https://www.rsssf.org/miscellaneous/kovalyov-intl.html). The Rec.Sport.Soccer Statistics Foundation.

["Profile at academy.shakhtar.com"](https://web.archive.org/web/20160304042723/http://academy.shakhtar.com/ua/team/coach/?id=26&team_name=u16). Archived from [the original](http://academy.shakhtar.com/ua/team/coach/?id=26&team_name=u16) on 4 March 2016. Retrieved 7 June 2012.

**Serhiy Kovalyov** ([Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukrainian_language "Ukrainian language"): Сергій Миколайович Ковальов; 21 November 1971 in [Donetsk Oblast](/wiki/Donetsk_Oblast "Donetsk Oblast"), [Ukrainian SSR](/wiki/Ukrainian_SSR "Ukrainian SSR")) was a [Ukrainian](/wiki/Ukraine "Ukraine") professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") and currently is football manager.

His first trainer was P. Ponomarenko.[[2]](#cite_note-career-2)

Due to medical condition, Kovalyov was forced to retire from playing.

## Career statistics

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Serhiy_Kovalyov&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Career statistics")]

## Honours

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Serhiy_Kovalyov&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Honours")]

* [Ukrainian Premier League](/wiki/Ukrainian_Premier_League "Ukrainian Premier League") runner-up: 1997, 1998, 1999, 2000.
* [Ukrainian Cup](/wiki/Ukrainian_Cup "Ukrainian Cup") winner: 1995, 1997, 2001.
